phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Pousada entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da pousada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH poow-ZAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff prioritize concise directions to maintain visitor flow in historic spaces.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Pousada de Óbidos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH poow-ZAH-duh DIH AW-bee-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Pousada de Óbidos.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Pousada de Óbidos.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH poow-ZAH-duh DIH AW-bee-doosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Pousada de Óbidos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Pousada entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da Pousada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH poow-ZAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Pousada is inside the castle, so the entrance is via the castle's main gate.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao funcionário da Pousada na receção.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH poow-ZAH-duh NUH reh-sih-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the Pousada staff at the reception desk.

responses.english: Ask the Pousada staff at the reception desk.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH poow-ZAH-duh NUH reh-sih-SOWN.
responses.local: Pergunte ao funcionário da Pousada na receção.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Jardim da Rainha is located
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o Jardim da Rainha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH RUHEE-nyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Garden locations are often referenced by cardinal directions for precision.

likely_response.local: Pode pedir indicações na bilheteira ou a um guia turístico.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih pih-DEER een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask for directions at the ticket booth or from a tour guide.

responses.english: You can ask for directions at the ticket booth or from a tour guide.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih pih-DEER een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
responses.local: Pode pedir indicações na bilheteira ou a um guia turístico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Torre de Menagem
phrases.text_local: Como chegar à Torre de Menagem?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR AH TAW-rih DIH meh-NAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: Keepers use clear, standardized routes to manage crowd movement efficiently.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre de Menagem.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DIH meh-NAH-zhayng.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Torre de Menagem.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Torre de Menagem.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DIH meh-NAH-zhayng.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Torre de Menagem.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to access the castle walls
phrases.text_local: Como aceder às Muralhas do Castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo uh-sih-DEHR UHUHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Access points are strictly guided to ensure safety on historic stone pathways.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Muralhas do Castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Castle Walls.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Castle Walls.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as Muralhas do Castelo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Capela de São Martinho is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela de São Martinho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SOWN muh-ruh-TEE-nyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Chapels are positioned strategically within fortifications for historical reference.

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar na bilheteira ou a um guia turístico.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask at the ticket booth or a tour guide.

responses.english: You can ask at the ticket booth or a tour guide.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
responses.local: Pode perguntar na bilheteira ou a um guia turístico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Torre de Menagem
phrases.text_local: Com licença, para a Torre de Menagem?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DIH meh-NAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: Torre de Menagem is the main keep tower, and visitors often need to climb a series of stone steps to reach it. Be mindful of the steep, uneven stairs.

likely_response.local: Subindo a escada principal, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: soo-BEEN-doo AH SHKAH-duh preen-see-PAHL, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Up the main stairs, on the right.

responses.english: Up the main stairs, on the right.
responses.phonetic: soo-BEEN-doo AH SHKAH-duh preen-see-PAHL, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: Subindo a escada principal, à direita.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Pousada entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da Pousada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH poow-ZAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Pousada de Óbidos is located within the castle walls, and its entrance is accessed via the main gate of the castle.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Pousada de Óbidos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH poow-ZAH-duh DIH AW-bee-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Pousada de Óbidos.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Pousada de Óbidos.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH poow-ZAH-duh DIH AW-bee-doosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Pousada de Óbidos.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Jardim da Rainha dentro do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH RUHEE-nyuh DAYNGT-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim da Rainha a partir do pátio principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH RUHEE-nyuh AH puh-ruh-TEER DOO PAHT-yoo preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Queen's Garden from the main courtyard.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Queen's Garden from the main courtyard.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH RUHEE-nyuh AH puh-ruh-TEER DOO PAHT-yoo preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim da Rainha a partir do pátio principal.
